description_long: This is a folding utility knife with a robust, angular design and a partially serrated black blade. The blade is single-edged and tapers to a sharp point, suitable for precision cutting tasks. The handle is predominantly yellow with black accents, featuring a contoured ergonomic grip and a visible locking mechanism. The handle appears to be made of metal or reinforced polymer, with a metallic clip or attachment point at the end for portability. The DeWalt branding is visible on the side, indicating a tool-oriented, durable construction. The overall appearance suggests a tool designed for heavy-duty use in urban or industrial environments.
description: A yellow and black folding utility knife with a partially serrated black blade and ergonomic handle, branded for heavy-duty use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the knife, with the DeWalt logo, yellow handle, and black blade clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the knife, with the blade tip and handle width aligned.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the yellow handle and black blade, with visible screws and attachment point.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the spine of the blade and the thickness of the handle.
attribute_handle_design: contoured yellow and black handle with ergonomic grip and metallic clip
